'''ngohapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucharistical|eucharistical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucharistical|eucharistical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngohapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohapithi|ngohapithi]] || [[word:ngohapiji|ngohapiji]] || [[word:ngohapishi|ngohapishi]] || [[word:ngohapiki|ngohapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohaputhuthu|ngohaputhuthu]] || [[word:ngohapujuju|ngohapujuju]] || [[word:ngohapushushu|ngohapushushu]] || [[word:ngohapukuku|ngohapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohaputhu|ngohaputhu]] || [[word:ngohapuju|ngohapuju]] || [[word:ngohapushu|ngohapushu]] || [[word:ngohapuku|ngohapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohapufthuf|ngohapufthuf]] || [[word:ngohapufjuf|ngohapufjuf]] || [[word:ngohapufshuf|ngohapufshuf]] || [[word:ngohapufkuf|ngohapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohapethe|ngohapethe]] || [[word:ngohapeje|ngohapeje]] || [[word:ngohapeshe|ngohapeshe]] || [[word:ngohapeke|ngohapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohapothotho|ngohapothotho]] || [[word:ngohapojojo|ngohapojojo]] || [[word:ngohaposhosho|ngohaposhosho]] || [[word:ngohapokoko|ngohapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohapotho|ngohapotho]] || [[word:ngohapojo|ngohapojo]] || [[word:ngohaposho|ngohaposho]] || [[word:ngohapoko|ngohapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohapofthof|ngohapofthof]] || [[word:ngohapofjof|ngohapofjof]] || [[word:ngohapofshof|ngohapofshof]] || [[word:ngohapofkof|ngohapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohapïfthïf|ngohapïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfjïf|ngohapïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfshïf|ngohapïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfkïf|ngohapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohapïfthïfthïf|ngohapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfjïfjïf|ngohapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfshïfshïf|ngohapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfkïfkïf|ngohapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohapïfthïf|ngohapïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfjïf|ngohapïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfshïf|ngohapïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfkïf|ngohapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohapïfthïf|ngohapïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfjïf|ngohapïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfshïf|ngohapïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohapïfkïf|ngohapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohapæthæ|ngohapæthæ]] || [[word:ngohapæjæ|ngohapæjæ]] || [[word:ngohapæshæ|ngohapæshæ]] || [[word:ngohapækæ|ngohapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohapathatha|ngohapathatha]] || [[word:ngohapajaja|ngohapajaja]] || [[word:ngohapashasha|ngohapashasha]] || [[word:ngohapakaka|ngohapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohapatha|ngohapatha]] || [[word:ngohapaja|ngohapaja]] || [[word:ngohapasha|ngohapasha]] || [[word:ngohapaka|ngohapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohapafthaf|ngohapafthaf]] || [[word:ngohapafjaf|ngohapafjaf]] || [[word:ngohapafshaf|ngohapafshaf]] || [[word:ngohapafkaf|ngohapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngohapasha|ngohapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohapshësha|ngohapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohaprosha|ngohaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohapmusha|ngohapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohapyasha|ngohapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohapnkshësha|gongohapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohapnkrosha|gongohapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohapnkmusha|gongohapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohapnkyasha|gongohapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngohahapasha|ngohahapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohahapshësha|ngohahapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohahaprosha|ngohahaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohahapmusha|ngohahapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohahapyasha|ngohahapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohahapnkshësha|gongohahapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohahapnkrosha|gongohahapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohahapnkmusha|gongohahapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohahapnkyasha|gongohahapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngehæpasha|ngehæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngehæpshësha|ngehæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngehæprosha|ngehæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngehæpmusha|ngehæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngehæpyasha|ngehæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongehæpnkshësha|gongehæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongehæpnkrosha|gongehæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongehæpnkmusha|gongehæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongehæpnkyasha|gongehæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngohfapasha|ngohfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohfapshësha|ngohfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohfaprosha|ngohfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohfapmusha|ngohfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohfapyasha|ngohfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohfapnkshësha|gongohfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohfapnkrosha|gongohfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohfapnkmusha|gongohfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohfapnkyasha|gongohfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
